series_metadata.series_description: The Check Balancing Logs are completed for each check run. The Check Balancing Logs contain the number of checks used; the number range of the checks, the dollar value of checks printed, balances, etc. The Check Balancing Logs are completed by computer operators and are signed off by the shift supervisor.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and ; Electronic: in Operations I: Drive folder, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and
